intro.p1: Inspired by traditional Balinese village clusters combined with original modern design and detailed attention to comfort, Casabama is a modern 3-villa complex offering a total of 11 bedrooms and 3 pools. Adorned with Indonesian art and craft, the villas provide a relaxing and tranquil homely environment.
intro.p2: Each house is self-contained and interlinked via a garden gateway. A gym room at the front of this property is shared by the three villas, while between the villas and the ocean lies a beautiful 29 are grassy field, perfect for weddings and events.
intro.p3: Surrounded by corn fields, banana plantations and coconut groves, Casabama is a short walk from the sandy shores of Saba Bay, South East Bali.

location.label: Location
location.description: Located near Saba Bay on the East coast of Bali, which has views across to the islands of Lembongan and Penida. It is 15km up the coast from Sanur, and a similar distance to Ubud, which can be reached via delightful routes through Balinese villages and temples.

accommodation.label: Accommodation
accommodation.description: Each two-storey private luxury Villa is composed to offer views of the nearby ocean to the South East and the slopes of the mountain Gunung Agung to the North.

dining.label: Dining
dining.description: Our in-house chef and team can provide delicious meals from our suggestive menu, with sufficient notice.

experiences.label: Experiences
experiences.description: From sunrise surf at Keramas to river rafting and hidden canyon walks, Gianyar is Bali's playground for nature and adventure. Slow it down in the rice terraces, artisan villages, temples, and local markets — then finish the day with great food and a massage in Ubud.

occasions.heading: OCCASIONS
occasions.p1: caSabama has a 20are (200m²) lawn which can be rented for events linked to a stay.
occasions.p2: Our team has experience in planning and delivering events ranging from weddings and anniversaries to parties and celebrations of special occasions. Whether you require marquees, musical performers, DJ equipment, bar service, fireworks, our team can organise it. Get in touch with us to discuss your requirements.

experiencesPage.heading: EXPERIENCES
experiencesPage.p1: Here are some suggested activities and excursions for your stay in caSabama.
experiencesPage.p2: Some of these are highly weather dependent. If the weather is doubtful, a provisional booking can be made for these, which can be confirmed on the day.
experiencesPage.p3: We recommend doing the excursions requiring a drive in the morning when the traffic is generally better. If you are interested in any, let us know so that we can provide pricing information and help to arrange the guides, tickets and transportation, as required.

dining.heading: DININGS
dining.description: Our in-house chef and team can provide delicious meals from our suggested menu, with sufficient notice.

facilities.heading: FACILITIES & SERVICES
facilities.p1: Villa caSabama is supported by a team of friendly staff who fulfil their duties with enthusiasm and smiles.
facilities.p2: They are never intrusive, yet they are always there to ensure that you will experience a truly enjoyable stay. Their genuine enthusiasm, warmth, and service from the heart is charming, modest and unassuming.

accommodation.heading: ACCOMMODATION
accommodation.p1: Each two-storey private luxury Villa is composed to offer views of the nearby ocean to the South East and the slopes of the mountain Gunung Agung to the North.
accommodation.p2: The fully staffed luxury villas may be rented in any combination of the 2 – 11 bedrooms to suit the number of guests – making it the perfect venue for a retreat, celebration, family reunion or friendly hideaway for a honeymoon couple or a small family excited to experience the real Bali in an unspoilt seaside location.
accommodation.p3: Rooms can be booked for a minimum of 3 nights, with 3 rooms being the minimum booking. Check-in between 2pm and 10pm (note while security is present 24 hours, we do not offer a 24 hour reception).
accommodation.sqMLabel: sq M of Indoor & Outdoor Space

about.label: About
about.p1: Inspired by traditional Balinese village clusters combined with original modern design and detailed attention to comfort, Casabama is a modern 3-villa complex offering a total of 11 bedrooms and 3 pools. Adorned with Indonesian art and craft, the villas provide a relaxing and tranquil homely environment.
about.p2: Each house is self-contained and interlinked via a garden gateway. A gym room at the front of this property is shared by the three villas, while between the villas and the ocean lies a beautiful 29 are grassy field, perfect for weddings and events.
about.p3: Surrounded by corn fields, banana plantations and coconut groves, Casabama is a short walk from the sandy shores of Saba Bay, South East Bali.

team.label: Team
team.description: Villa caSabama is supported by a team of friendly staff who take pride in their duties with enthusiasm and smiles. They are never intrusive, yet they are always there to ensure that you have a wonderful stay. Their genuine warmth and authentic hospitality make every guest feel genuinely welcomed.

gettingHere.label: Location
gettingHere.heading: GETTING HERE
gettingHere.description1: Bali has one international airport, Ngurah Rai Airport (DPS) which is a 60-minute drive away from caSabama.
gettingHere.description2: There are numerous taxis available for hire at the airport or we can arrange a private transfer at additional cost.
gettingHere.description3: For information about private charters, please contact the airport directly.

contact.heading: CONTACT US
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you. Get in touch with us for any inquiries about your stay at caSabama.
